sprint.goal: Fix security regression #924 (null byte bypass in canonicalizePath). Continue v3.0 release readiness.

senior.title: fix(claude-init): write hooks with full binary path instead of bare 'agentguard'
senior.note: Added hookCmd() helper to claude-init and copilot-init that resolves binary via ${AGENTGUARD_BIN:-./node_modules/.bin/agentguard}. 765 CLI tests passing. PR #970 opened.

prs.title: fix(matchers): reject URL-encoded null bytes (%00) in canonicalizePath (closes #924)
fix(simulate): add shell.exec simulator and git.force-push action type
fix(claude-init): resolve binary path in hook commands (closes #964)
